use_cases: Displaying team members on a company about page
Showcasing staff profiles on a landing page
Creating a team directory for an organization website
Featuring contributors on an open source project page
Introducing team members on a portfolio or agency site
ai_summary: A responsive team section component that displays a grid of team member cards with name, designation, image, and social links. Features a subtle background grid pattern for visual depth and includes a header section with title and description. Designed with a minimalist flat aesthetic suitable for SaaS and corporate websites.
